title: Claude Code & Cowork Now Run 24/7 — Scheduled Tasks
description:
Anthropic just released scheduled tasks in Claude Cowork, and it's one of the most genuinely useful AI features I've seen. In this video, I show you how scheduled tasks work, walk through three real workflows I use every day, and share a free plugin I built that brings the same functionality to Claude Code.

My real use cases:
- Automated weekly Stripe sales reports
- Daily Substack Note idea generation
- Nightly brain dump organization into my context system

Join my free newsletter for weekly AI tips and techniques!
https://theailaunchpad.substack.com/
